title: Iceberg catalog bad error message on CREATE TABLE
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Using an existing Iceberg table on REST catalog under `test` namespace, run in ClickHouse:
```sql
CREATE TABLE d0.`test.t41` ENGINE = IcebergS3(s3, url = 'http://minio:9000/warehouse-rest/t41', format = 'ORC') PARTITION BY (farmHash64(`c0`)) SETTINGS storage_catalog_type = 'rest', storage_warehouse = 'd0', object_storage_endpoint = 'http://minio:9000/warehouse-rest', storage_catalog_url = 'http://rest:8181/v1';
--DB::Exception: Table d0.`test.t41` does not exist. Maybe you meant d0.`test.t41`?
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> executeQuery: Code: 60. DB::Exception: Table d0.`test.t41` does not exist. Maybe you meant d0.`test.t41`?. (UNKNOWN_TABLE) (version 25.10.1.2084 (official build)) (from 172.18.0.1:56740) (query 1, line 1) (in query: CREATE TABLE d0.`test.t41` ENGINE = IcebergS3(s3, url = 'http://minio:9000/warehouse-rest/t41', format = 'ORC') PARTITION BY (farmHash64(`c0`)) SETTINGS storage_catalog_type = 'rest', storage_warehouse = 'd0', object_storage_endpoint = 'http://minio:9000/warehouse-rest', storage_catalog_url = 'http://rest:8181/v1';), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x00000000240d1af2
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:128: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x0000000014a325e9
2. src/Common/Exception.h:123: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d32930e
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d328d11
4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<String, String, String, String>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<String>::type, std::type_identity<String>::type, std::type_identity<String>::type, std::type_identity<String>::type>, String&&, String&&, String&&, String&&) @ 0x000000000d3faa36
5. src/Databases/IDatabase.cpp:43: DB::IDatabase::getTable(String const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) const @ 0x0000000019879ebd
6. src/Interpreters/InterpreterCreateQuery.cpp:1854: DB::InterpreterCreateQuery::doCreateTable(DB::ASTCreateQuery&, DB::InterpreterCreateQuery::TableProperties const&, std::unique_ptr<DB::DDLGuard, std::default_delete<DB::DDLGuard>>&, DB::LoadingStrictnessLevel) @ 0x000000001a684072
7. src/Interpreters/InterpreterCreateQuery.cpp:1752: DB::InterpreterCreateQuery::createTable(DB::ASTCreateQuery&) @ 0x000000001a67bb6c
8. src/Interpreters/InterpreterCreateQuery.cpp:2377: DB::InterpreterCreateQuery::execute() @ 0x000000001a688b92
9. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1603: DB::executeQueryImpl(char const*, char const*, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum, std::unique_ptr<DB::ReadBuffer, std::default_delete<DB::ReadBuffer>>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::ImplicitTransactionControlExecutor>, std::function<void ()>) @ 0x000000001aa45c02
10. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1812: DB::executeQuery(String const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum) @ 0x000000001aa3f8b2
11. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:743: DB::TCPHandler::runImpl() @ 0x000000001e30e06e
12. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:2754: DB::TCPHandler::run() @ 0x000000001e3279a4
13. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerConnection.cpp:40: Poco::Net::TCPServerConnection::start() @ 0x0000000024188507
14. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerDispatcher.cpp:115: Poco::Net::TCPServerDispatcher::run() @ 0x0000000024188ae5
15. base/poco/Foundation/src/ThreadPool.cpp:205: Poco::PooledThread::run() @ 0x0000000024127c7f
16. base/poco/Foundation/src/Thread_POSIX.cpp:341: Poco::ThreadImpl::runnableEntry(void*) @ 0x0000000024125351
17. ? @ 0x0000000000094ac3
18. ? @ 0x0000000000126850
```
poc: CREATE TABLE d0.`test.t41` ENGINE = IcebergS3(s3, url = 'http://minio:9000/warehouse-rest/t41', format = 'ORC') PARTITION BY (farmHash64(`c0`)) SETTINGS storage_catalog_type = 'rest', storage_warehouse = 'd0', object_storage_endpoint = 'http://minio:9000/warehouse-rest', storage_catalog_url = 'http://rest:8181/v1';
key_bug_features: CREATE TABLE with IcebergS3 engine on REST catalog
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE d0.`test.t42` (id UInt32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now()) ENGINE = IcebergS3(s3, url = 'http://minio:9000/warehouse-rest/t42', format = 'PARQUET') PARTITION BY (farmHash64(`id`)) SETTINGS storage_catalog_type = 'rest', storage_warehouse = 'd0', object_storage_endpoint = 'http://minio:9000/warehouse-rest', storage_catalog_url = 'http://rest:8181/v1';

CREATE TABLE d0.`test.t43` (id UInt32, value Nullable(Float64)) ENGINE = IcebergS3(s3, url = 'http://minio:9000/warehouse-rest/t43', format = 'ORC') PARTITION BY (farmHash64(`id`)) SETTINGS storage_catalog_type = 'rest', storage_warehouse = 'd0', object_storage_endpoint = 'http://minio:9000/warehouse-rest', storage_catalog_url = 'http://rest:8181/v1';
INSERT INTO d0.`test.t43` (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 3.14);
SELECT id, value FROM d0.`test.t43` WHERE value IS NULL;
